author: EisFrei - fork by DanielOnDiordna
name: Live Inventory
description: Show current in-game inventory. Requires CORE subscription. Fork by DanielOnDiordna https://github.com/DanielOndiordna/IngressLiveInventory extras: menu buttons, refresh feedback, portals list key count, capsule view, keys in capsule view on portals, zoom keys, draw bookmarks.
